The PR adds cooperative yielding and abort-aware error classification to Ollama native stream processing, with focused dense NDJSON stream tests.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +86. Total +133 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Partially: the narrow dense Ollama NDJSON stream path is source-reproducible from current main and the added test shape, but the full Windows Gateway starvation scenario has not been reproduced in this review.

target.title: fix(ollama): yield during dense stream processing
target.body:
## Summary

- add cooperative yielding while Ollama native streams process dense NDJSON bursts
- preserve caller abort handling during those yields so aborted runs surface as aborted instead of generic stream errors
- add focused coverage that proves timers can fire before dense stream completion

Fixes part of #86599.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` provider=aws lease=cbx_ed8a1d067901 slug=golden-shrimp run=run_03fc17ebdc95 base=827ceb55d074b8a2e394218e8a2b4cb839619646 exit=0
target.author: vincentkoc
